pick.reasoning: Rai shows positive expected value in three separate finish-position markets this week — top-5, top-10, and top-20 — the only player in the field with that level of cross-market alignment. The DG model has his fair top-10 odds at +385; DraftKings offers +430, a +9.3% positive EV play. His ball-striking-heavy game lines up directly with TPC Toronto's North Course, which debuts in our model this week with the highest combined Off-the-Tee + Approach weight (56%) of any venue we track.
